response.justification: The resume is severely misaligned with the job description: the candidate is a senior-level engineer with 10+ years of experience across dozens of roles, yet the position is for an entry-level individual contributor; the candidate's expertise leans heavily toward DLang, embedded systems, and legacy stacks rather than TypeScript/React/Nest.js; and the resume contains inconsistent name/email/GitHub details (Szabo Bogdan vs. Sarah Smith), suggesting fabrication or severe misrepresentation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and systems
Strong open-source contributions and public technical talks
Proven ability to lead and build complex systems from scratch
concerns: Overqualified and mislabeled as junior/mid-level; likely to leave quickly
Minimal evidence of modern React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience
Name and contact details mismatch raise red flags about authenticity
